about: SINZ is New England's premier lifestyle club, offering a members-only ultra lounge experience with a full bar, dance floor, and themed events for couples and single women. Located on the north shore of Massachusetts, the club hosts parties every other Saturday evening.

Sterling Club is a BYOB on-premise lifestyle venue in Boston's Metro-West area, offering a neighborhood bar atmosphere for couples and single women. The 2,000-square-foot facility features a lounge area and private playrooms with parties scheduled most Saturday evenings.
